'''Piton''' was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="Captive" /> located in the [[Piton system/Legends|Piton system]] of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].<ref name="TEA" /> It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Piton (species)|Piton]] [[Species/Legends|species]], which lived underground. [[Miro Daroon]], who had become a member of the off-world [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]<ref name="Captive" /> at some point by approximately [[53 BBY/Legends|53 BBY]],<ref name="Date">''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Captive Temple]]'' establishes that [[Miro Daroon]] was a member of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] at the same time as [[Xanatos]], who ceased to be a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] around [[53 BBY/Legends|53 BBY]] per [[Jedi — The Dark Side 5|''Jedi — The Dark Side'' 5]].</ref> was a Piton from the planet Piton.<ref name="Captive" />

==Behind the scenes==
Piton was first mentioned in [[Jedi Apprentice: The Captive Temple|''The Captive Temple'']], [[Jude Watson]]'s [[2000]] seventh installment of the ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Apprentice]]'' young-reader novel series.<ref name="Captive" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Piton [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the planet itself, in grid square K-12.<ref name="TEA" />
